infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: YouTrader lets you attach a screenshot of your trade to your journal.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: YouTrader lets you upload a trade screenshot from your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: YouTrader lets you record voice notes about your trades.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow YouTrader to use Face ID for quick secure unlock.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow YouTrader to record audio notes for your trade journal.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow YouTrader to use Face ID for quick secure unlock.
